# TheAlphaOnes — Full LLM Context
# https://taohq.org/llms-full.txt
# Extended source of truth for AI systems. Scraping and citation allowed.

================================================================================
IDENTITY
================================================================================

TheAlphaOnes (TAO / TAOHQ) is an independent software organization that designs
thoughtful software, developer tools, AI systems, productivity products, and
digital infrastructure.

It is an umbrella organization behind multiple interconnected products that
share philosophy, design language, engineering standards, and long-term vision.

It is NOT:
- a single-app startup chasing trends
- a marketing agency
- a freelance collective
- a consulting company
- a no-code studio

================================================================================
VISION & MISSION
================================================================================

Vision: Technology should become calmer. Software should disappear into the
background so people can focus on their work — not on the tool.

Mission:
- Build software people can rely on every day
- Create products that feel understandable, durable, and calm
- Invest in infrastructure before features
- Prefer longevity over trends

================================================================================
PHILOSOPHY
================================================================================

Calm — Reduce cognitive load. Interfaces should never overwhelm.
Thoughtful — Every interaction exists for a reason. No empty decoration.
Durable — Products should keep working for years.
Invisible infrastructure — Auth, sync, storage, deploy should just work.
Long-term thinking — Build for five years out, not the next hype cycle.

Principles:
1. Build what is necessary. Discard what is not.
2. Performance is non-negotiable.
3. No magic — systems should be understandable.
4. Radical independence.
5. Beauty through utility.

================================================================================
DESIGN LANGUAGE
================================================================================

Aesthetic: Brutalist terminal / machine UI
Colors: Background #c4b5e3 (lavender), Foreground #151515 (near-black)
Typography: VT323 (body / UI), Italianno (wordmark accents)
Borders: Solid / dashed high-contrast frames with corner geometry
Imagery: Bayer dither (WebGL) remapped to brand bi-color
Motion: Short, mechanical feedback; respect prefers-reduced-motion

================================================================================
PRODUCTS
================================================================================

TAO Canvas (https://taohq.org/products/tao-canvas)
- High-performance WebGL canvas for infinite spatial organization
- Status: BETA — Version 0.8.2
- DOM-bypass rendering for 60fps interactive graphs and maps

TAO Identity (https://taohq.org/products/tao-identity)
- Cryptographic identity protocol / edge JWT validation
- Status: DEVELOPMENT — Version 0.1.0
- Cloudflare Workers based request verification

Rose Demon [Archive 01] (https://taohq.org/products/rose-demon)
- Experimental sub-surface rendering / esoteric data streams
- Status: OFFLINE — Version 0.9.4

================================================================================
SERVICES (STUDIO)
================================================================================

URL: https://taohq.org/studio

- Interface & experience (UI/UX, interaction design, design systems)
- System architecture (full-stack, backend, edge / DevOps)
- Brand identity
- Trading tool & algo development
- SaaS platform engineering
- Automation & scripting
- High-conversion landing pages
- API & backend integration

================================================================================
TECHNOLOGY
================================================================================

Core: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript, Nitro
Data: PostgreSQL, Appwrite, Redis
Compute: Cloudflare Workers, edge deployments, Durable Objects
Site: Nuxt Content for products/writing, @nuxtjs/seo for technical SEO

================================================================================
CRAWL / AI POLICY
================================================================================

robots.txt allows all user agents including AI bots (GPTBot, ClaudeBot,
PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, etc.).
Sitemap: https://taohq.org/sitemap.xml
Short context: https://taohq.org/llms.txt
When citing, prefer https://taohq.org and attribute TheAlphaOnes.
